TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Seediq, story: sdqNr-frog_temi

S.FORM: um kingan laqi rseno dahaka huling ma qpatun gaga sapah laqi rseno nii taqian na.
S.TRANSL: 一個男孩、一隻狗和一隻青蛙在房子裡。他們在這男孩的房間裡。
A boy, a dog, and a frog are in the house. They are in the boy's room

S.FORM: qitaan mu kingan idas keyima?.
S.TRANSL: 我看到一個月亮。可以嗎？
I saw a moon. Is this Ok?

S.FORM: um gaga msuupu mita laqi rseno msuupu mita qpatun gaga rusuq ka huling.
S.TRANSL: 男孩和狗一起看在瓶子裡的青蛙。
The boy and the dog were looking at the frog in the bottle together.

S.FORM: saya mprengo ku kingan a oda nodaan na kari kingan laqi rseno dahaka huling.
S.TRANSL: 現在呢，我要來說一個關於一個男孩和狗的故事。
Now, I'm going to tell a story about a boy and a dog.

S.FORM: huling dahaka laqi rseno nii ga mi gaga rusug truma hii ka qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 狗和這個小男孩在看在罐子裡的青蛙。
The dog and the dog are looking at the frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: kiya huling nii wa mpqerac heya.
S.TRANSL: 那麼這隻狗呢，他就想去抓(青蛙)。
And this dog, it is trying to catch (the frog).

S.FORM: ma riso laqi mu rseno nii mqaras riyung mita mhulis uri.
S.TRANSL: 這個小男孩看了很高興，也笑了。
And the boy was very happy, seeing this. He was laughing too.

S.FORM: tloong ga kac na ga qmita qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 他坐在他的椅子椅子上，看著青蛙。
Sitting on his chair, he was looking at the frog.

S.FORM: keeman de qitaan ta sapah na eniqan a idas a.
S.TRANSL: 到了晚上，我們從房子看到月亮。
It was night now, and we could see the moon from the house.

S.FORM: bobo a qitaan kndalax bais na ka idas sapah truma nii sapah na laqi nii we sapah taqian na.
S.TRANSL: 之後，這個小孩在房子裡，從房間的窗戶看到的月亮。
Afterwards, the kid saw the moon from the window of his house, from his room.

S.FORM: heya gaga taqi sapah a ga taqi qlapo.
S.TRANSL: 這小孩在房裡的床上睡覺。
The boy was sleeping on the bed, in his house.

S.FORM: kignan huling na ga suupu mtaqi heya ga mtaqi bobo pala na uri laqi nii.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗也跟他一起睡。他(狗)睡在小男孩的被子上。
His dog was sleeping with him. He (the dog) was sleeping on the boy's quilt.

S.FORM: qpatun nii de anu ga mtaqi dheya huling dahaka riso nii qpatun do mkala kndalax rusuq meyah nganguc ka qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 因為狗狗和小男孩在睡覺，這隻青蛙就從瓶子裡爬出來，而來到了外面。
Since they, the dog and the boy, were sleeping, the frog climbed out of the bottle, and came outside.

S.FORM: tutuy ka huling dahaka laqi rseno nii qitaan daha rusuq uka hii ka qpatun di wada qduriq di.
S.TRANSL: 狗狗和小男孩醒來後，他們便又看著瓶子。但是青蛙卻不在那裏。他已經逃走了。
The dog and the boy woke up. They looked at the bottle, and the frog wasn't there. He had escaped!

S.FORM: sklui mita huling dahaka laqi rseno nii wada qduriq ka qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 這個男孩和狗看到青蛙逃走了很驚訝。
The dog and the boy were surprised to find that the frog had escaped.

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii wa mesa ka sklui skadiun dahaka qpatun nii.
S.TRANSL: 男孩於是「哇」的叫著。驚嚇之餘，他開始尋找青蛙。
The boy then cried out, "wa ...". He was surprised, and he stared to look for the frog.

S.FORM: kelaun gaga s so sapi n s wada tgleeng sapi sapi na.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙可能躲在他的鞋子裡。
Perhaps it (the frog) had gone hiding in his shoes!

S.FORM: laqi rseno de raguhun daha bais raguhun na bais mlama mlawa qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩打開窗戶不斷地呼喊著青蛙。
The boy opened the window and kept calling for the frog.

S.FORM: mlawa heya wada su inu di mesa peni.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩呼喊著青蛙「你去哪裡了？」他是這麼說的吧。
He was calling. "Where did you go?" he probably said this

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii so sklui mita ka doriq na.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩的眼神好像是驚慌到了。
The boy's look seems to show that he was panicing.

S.FORM: kiya sklui laqi nii ayu bale mesa.
S.TRANSL: 所以小男孩驚嚇到了。「唉呀！」他叫出聲來。
So the boy was shocked. "Ayu!" he cried.

S.FORM: eniqan qhuni paru siyo sapah na.
S.TRANSL: 他的房子旁邊有棵大樹。
There is a big tree next to his house.

S.FORM: kiya theya hari nodaan daha mkesa meyah kingan pusu qhuni.
S.TRANSL: 接著他們走遠一點，來到了樹下。
Then they walked a little farther, and arrived at the bottom of a tree.

S.FORM: qitaan daha kingan a cudu a walu cudu walu a eniqan a walu truma hiya.
S.TRANSL: 他們看見一個蜂窩，裡面有蜜蜂。
They saw a bee hive, and there were bees inside.

S.FORM: ma eniqan kingan beling uri kingan pusu qhuni eniqan beling uri qhuni paru.
S.TRANSL: 大樹的根部也有一個洞。
There was also a hole in the root of the big tree.

S.FORM: kiya ka meyah dehuk a toma ga eniqan cudu walu dheya daha nii.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們來到了那棵有蜂窩的樹下面。
Then they both arrived at the root of the tree where there was a bee hive.

S.FORM: huling na do mleus mleus a a so a so mkmangan so a cudu walu peni.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗瘋狂地吠著，他可能是想要把蜂窩拿起來吧。
The dog barked furiously. He probably wanted to take the bee hive.

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii ge mita kingan a tgakac mita kingan a beling dheran.
S.TRANSL: 這個男孩蹲下來往地洞裡看。
The boy knelt down and looked into the hole on the ground.

S.FORM: heya mita kingan beling dheran sklui asi tkriyak kndalax beling dheran hiya ka kingan qolic qolic yqeyaq.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩往洞裡看時嚇了一跳因為從洞裡突然出現了一隻田鼠。
Looking into the hole, he was shocked, because a vole suddenly appeared from the hole.

S.FORM: ma ni huling na ge mbeyax bale psgeluy psgeluy qhuni ptuting a so cudu walu ma so mkmekan uri peni.
S.TRANSL: 然後狗用力地搖樹讓蜂窩掉下來。他可能是想吃那個蜂窩。
Then the dog tried hard to shake the tree and make the bee hive fall. It seems that he wanted to eat it.

S.FORM: so kiya a slualu na ka qhuni kiya ka meyah nganguc ka kana walu mneniq truma na hiya truma cudu.
S.TRANSL: 因為狗搖了那棵樹，所有原本在蜂窩裡面的蜜蜂都跑到外面了。
Because the dog shaked the tree, all the bees which were inside the hive came out.

S.FORM: kiya ka ado na su uh slugelu ka qhuni huling nii kiya ka wada tuting ka cudu walu di tuting dheran meyah nganguc kana ka walu di.
S.TRANSL: 所以因為狗去搖樹，蜂窩掉到了地上，導致所有蜜蜂都跑了出來。
So, because the dog shaked the tree, the bee hive fell to the ground, and all the bees came out.

S.FORM: ngiyo a maanu di qolic meniq beling dheran sklui ba mita so walu ga meyah nganguc pqiyuc seediq uri.
S.TRANSL: 連在地洞裡的老鼠看到蜜蜂出來也嚇了一跳，他們是會叮人的。
The vole from the hole was also shocked after seeing the bees that came out, because they sting people.

S.FORM: laqi rseno nii mdakin a bobo qhuni pusu paru ma eniqan beling hiya duri.
S.TRANSL: 這男孩也爬上這棵根部有大洞的樹。
The boy also climbed up the tree with a hole on the root.

S.FORM: ma musa mii maanu di musa mita heya ka laqi nii musa mdakin qhuni baro qitaan na beling kii maanu.
S.TRANSL: 他爬上樹去，看著那個洞穴，心想洞穴裡面到底是有什麼。
He climbed up the tree to see into the hole, wondering what's in there.

S.FORM: kelaan musa t musa tgleeng hiya ka qpatun mesa.
S.TRANSL: 他猜想著青蛙可能躲到洞裡去了。
Probably the frog went hiding there, he thought.

S.FORM: kiya do maanu kingan nii we asi eyah baro ka tekung kndalax beling.
S.TRANSL: 有一隻貓頭鷹突然從樹洞裡飛出來。
An owl suddenly came out from the hole.

S.FORM: osaan na mqiri hiya sklui ka laqi nii takun kndalax a bobo q pusu qhuni.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩跑去看洞裡面有什麼。也許是因為被嚇到了，便從樹上跌下來。
The child went to see what's in the hole, and perhaps he was shocked by something, he fell from the tree.

S.FORM: kan ma qitaan ta huling nii tmalang tmalang ado sdurakun a walu peni.
S.TRANSL: 我們接著看到，這隻狗因為被蜜蜂追所以一直跑一直跑。
Now we see that the dog kept running and running, because he was chased by the bees.

S.FORM: walu meyah nganguc kana mqiyuc heya kiya ka tmalang ka huling nii.
S.TRANSL: 所有蜜蜂都出來要叮他，所以狗逃跑。
All the bees that came out were stinging him. So the dog was running away.

S.FORM: takun dheran ka laqi rseno nii.
S.TRANSL: 這個小男孩跌落在地上。
The boy fell on the ground.

S.FORM: kiya ka eniqan kingan qhuni btunux paru ka elu hiya.
S.TRANSL: 然後，路上有一個大石頭。
There was a big stone on the road.

S.FORM: tekung skiya ka tekung so skadi heya uri.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹飛了起來，可能也是要找他(小男孩)。
The owl was flying, probably looking for him (the boy), too.

S.FORM: tekung meyah a skadi laqi biciq nii uri skiya baro ini na kelai.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹來找小男孩。他也在上面飛。但他(小男孩)並不知道。
The owl came looking for the little boy. It was flying high above, but he (the boy) didn't know.

S.FORM: bobo bo bukuy btunux eniqan so hari cida hmili na cida qhuni kiya uri.
S.TRANSL: 之後，石頭後面好像有樹枝。其實是男孩把那誤以為是樹枝。
Afterwards, there seemed to be some branches behind the stone. But actually the boy mistook them for branches.

S.FORM: kndalax hiya dooiun na ka so cida kndalax hiya mlawa mlawa qpatun ka riso nii uri.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩抓著樹枝且在那呼喊青蛙。
The boy grabbed the branches and calls for the frog.

S.FORM: huling kii de miicu so walu snduruk heya sndurak heya.
S.TRANSL: 狗因為被蜜蜂追而顯得害怕。
The dog was afraid because he was chased by the bees.

S.FORM: kiya ka so mngungu gaga gaga a bukuy btunux ka huling nii uri.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗很害怕，便躲到了石頭後面去。
Being afraid, the dog hid himself behind the stone.

S.FORM: ma laqi nii ga mheyu bobo btunux lmawa qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 而小男孩則站在石頭上呼喊青蛙。
And the boy, he was standing on the stone, calling for the frog.

S.FORM: gaga mita heya ka tekung ga s ga cida qhuni bukuy na.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹從男孩後面的樹枝上看著他。
The owl was looking at the boy, staying on the branches behind him.

S.FORM: kiya di qitaan ta kingan nii ge huling nii musa bukuy musa bukuy btunux kiya ka musa sklui ka s rqenux.
S.TRANSL: 接著我們看到狗跑到石頭後面去，因而嚇到了一隻鹿。
Then we see that the dog went to the back of the stone, which made a deer shocked.

S.FORM: rqenux ka knparu gaga bukuy btunux.
S.TRANSL: 原來是那麼大的一隻鹿在石頭後面。
It was a very big deer that was behind the stone.

S.FORM: riso nii ga tdiyan wa asi tdiyan a urung a rqenux.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩突然就被鹿角勾到了。
The boy was suddenly hooked by the antler.

S.FORM: huling nii mnusa psklui heya kiya ka tutui ka rqenux nii tdiyan sklui ka laqi ali tdi laqi ga tgdi tdiyan urung na hiya.
S.TRANSL: 因為狗去嚇到了鹿，鹿就站了起來。小男孩因此被嚇到，而且還被鹿角給勾了起來。
The dog shocked the deer, so it stood up, and the boy was scared and hooked up by the antler of the deer.

S.FORM: so mlawa duri so angali ku bale dayoi ku e mesa mlawa ka riso nii uri.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩好像就大喊著：「放我下來！來幫我啊！」
He seems to be yelling "Put me down! Help me!"

S.FORM: huling na tmalang sbbukuy tmalang pus a huling na uri.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩的狗也在後面跑。
His dog is also running behind them.

S.FORM: so ma adisun a rqenux ka laqi rseno so mddayo so mdayo ka huling.
S.TRANSL: 因為眼看著男孩就要被鹿給帶走了，看起來這隻狗是想幫忙的樣子。
Since the boy was being carried away by the deer, the dog seemed to be trying to help the boy.

S.FORM: mda paru ka rqenux nii so hari miicu ka heya uri.
S.TRANSL: 這隻鹿很大，所以狗看起來也很害怕。
The deer was big, so the dog seemed to be afraid of it as well.

S.FORM: kiya ka byaq betaq kdere di.
S.TRANSL: 他們到達了一處懸崖。
They arrived at a cliff.

S.FORM: wada tuting kdere ka ngahu ka kdere ngahu ka huling uri.
S.TRANSL: 所以狗也掉落到懸崖邊。
And the dog also fell off the precipice.

S.FORM: rqenux nii wada na asi gdaani kdere ngahu ka laqi rseno kii duri.
S.TRANSL: 這隻鹿把小男孩丟下懸崖。
The deer threw the boy off the cliff.

S.FORM: kiya o da huling na ma laqi a rseno nii suupu wada tuting lhengo a kdere.
S.TRANSL: 狗和小男孩便一起掉進一個岩洞裡。
So the dog and the boy fell into a cave together.

S.FORM: truma na do qsiya kiya kesi yayung peni gcilung kesaun ta.
S.TRANSL: 洞裡有水，就是河流啊，或是我們所謂的湖泊。
Inside the cave was water. It was a river, or what we call a lake.

S.FORM: qsiya gcilung kdere eniqan kingan qhuni paru na uri.
S.TRANSL: 在崖邊的湖水上有一塊大木頭。
There is also a big piece of wood on the water.

S.FORM: suoyi kiya ka dungus daha daha laqi nii meyah skadi a so qpatun wada qduriq peni.
S.TRANSL: 所以他們原本的目的就是想要來找跑掉的青蛙。
So their original purpose was to look for the frog that ran away.

S.FORM: da huling nii qitaan ta wa mita kndalax a baro ka rqenux.
S.TRANSL: 我們看這狗呢，鹿正從上面看著他。
Here we see the dog (down here), and the deer was looking at it from the top.

S.FORM: mtuting tuting gcilung gsiya ka huling na dahaka riso nii dahaka laqi rseno nii.
S.TRANSL: 狗和小男孩掉進了湖水裡。
The dog and the boy fell into the water of the lake.

S.FORM: musa dungan ga skadi a thngali ho btunux kana so sudu wada skadi a wada skadi qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 他們又繼續尋找(青蛙)。在石堆的另一邊，那兒到處都是草。他們繼續學找青蛙。
They went to look for it (the frog) again, on the other side of the stones, where there was grass everywhere. They searched for the frog.

S.FORM: ma meyah betaq a lmanguy ka huling na heya do anu mita kiyan a qhuni buro hiya.
S.TRANSL: 狗游了過去，到達時小拿還在那兒發現了一塊腐木。
The dog swam across, and there the boy found a rotten wood as he arrived.

S.FORM: ma iya squwaq kesaun na ka huling na yani kelaan gaga truma hii mesa peni.
S.TRANSL: 他對狗說：「不要講話！」「青蛙可能就在裡面！」他說。
"Keep quiet!" he told his dog. "It (the frog) might be right in there!" he said.

S.FORM: kiya ka huling na mdakin a buro qhuni nii ma heya uri.
S.TRANSL: 所以狗爬上了這根腐木，而男孩也是。
So the dog climbed over this rotten wood, and so did the boy.

S.FORM: anu qsiya gcilung ka ga daha eniqan.
S.TRANSL: 他們在湖水裡。
They are in the lake water.

S.FORM: kiya ka mdakin a qhuni buro nii ka laqi rseno ma huling na.
S.TRANSL: 因為他們是在湖水之中，小男孩和他的狗便爬上這塊腐木。
Since where they were at was the lake water, the boy and his dog climbed up this rotten wood.

S.FORM: dheya do mntena so mdakin bobo qhuni buro kii paru riyung qhuni nii biciq.
S.TRANSL: 一樣地小男孩和狗都爬上了這個腐木。
In the same way they both climbed up this rotten wood.

S.FORM: ma qitaan daha toma na eniqan qu qmita maanu dheya.
S.TRANSL: 然後呢，他們就(往木頭裡面)看。他們在看什麼呢？
Then, they looked (into the wood). What were they looking at?

S.FORM: daha qpatun bubu na dahaka wawa na.
S.TRANSL: 是兩隻青蛙–青蛙媽媽和他的孩子。
It was two frogs–the mother frog and her child.

S.FORM: msuupu ga tloong bukuy qhuni buro.
S.TRANSL: 他們一起坐在腐木的後面。
They were sitting together behind the rotten wood.

S.FORM: ma meyah hini dungan mtara muta qitaan daha huling na tloong baro uri tloong baro buro qhuni tloong ka riso.
S.TRANSL: 然後，他們又來繼續看著。狗和小男孩都坐在腐木上。
Then, they came here again to see, the dog and the boy sitting on the rotten wood.

S.FORM: qaras riyung mita egu qpatun wawa qpatun meyah mita meyah a meyah mita bubu dahaka qpa wawa qpatun nii peni.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到這麼多小青蛙很高興。他們來看著青蛙媽媽和這些小青蛙們。
They were happy to see so many children frogs. They came to see the mother frog and the children frogs.

S.FORM: so wawa na ga bukuy na uri wawa na paru.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙媽媽的後面也有小青蛙。他們是比較大的小青蛙。
There were also children frogs behind the mother. They were bigger ones.

S.FORM: nii do tniyo wawa na hani yani mntuting hari.
S.TRANSL: 這些小青蛙看起來都是剛出生的。
All these frogs seem to be newly born babies.

S.FORM: mqaras riyung bubu qpatun nii mqita so wawa daha mqaras ka riso duri.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙媽媽看著她的孩子感到非常快樂。小男孩也是。
The mother frog was very happy looking at her children, and the boy was happy too.

S.FORM: mqaras ka so sklui mita kana huling na ma heya so ga mhulis paru mesa.
S.TRANSL: 狗和小男孩看到那麼多隻青蛙又驚又喜，他們於是大聲地笑出來。
The dog and the boy were happy and surprised to see all the frogs, so they laughed loudly.

S.FORM: nii ta sdiyalun qpatun wada gedang di mesa so kiya ka kari laqi rseno nii.
S.TRANSL: 「我們找到遺失的青蛙了！」小男孩應該是那麼說的。
"Here, we have found the forg that had been lost!" That's probably what the boy said.

S.FORM: kiya do laqi riso nii angalun na kingan ka qpatun so hari wada wada has sdurakun mneniq sapah na.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩於是抓了一隻像本來在家裡的那隻青蛙。
The boy then grabbed one frog that looked like the one that was originally living in his house.

S.FORM: huling nii de mqaras riyung.
S.TRANSL: 這隻狗非常快樂。
The dog was very happy.

S.FORM: ga dmoi a kingan qpatun ka baba baga na di laqi rseno nii ma tmalang mmaha sapah de osaan daha osaan pusa sapah na dungan.
S.TRANSL: 小男孩用手抓一隻青蛙，跑回家，又把它放在家裡。
The boy grabbed one frog, and ran back to his house, to put it in the house.

S.FORM: kiya ka hngali nii we bubu na tama na ini kelai ha tama na ka bubu na.
S.TRANSL: 在另一邊的青蛙，不知道這隻青蛙媽媽是不是其實是青蛙爸爸？
The frog on the other side ... it's not known whether the mother frog was actually the father frog.

S.FORM: bobona hiya mpitu mpitu ka wawa ga tloong bukuy qpatun nii.
S.TRANSL: 有七隻小青蛙坐在後面。
Seven kid frogs sit behind this parent frog.

S.FORM: mita mita dheya mita wawa na wada adisun riso kii.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙們看著被小男孩帶走的那隻小青蛙。
They watched the kid frog being taken away by the boy.

S.FORM: so sm maa e gmaalu so wa nii wada adisun seediq di mesa piya.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙爸/媽好像心疼，他說：「小青蛙被人帶走啦！」。
The parent frog seems to find it pitiful, crying out "wa ..." "It (my child) has been taken away my a human" he said.

S.FORM: kiya mita bale mqaras duri mhulis kana daha.
S.TRANSL: 但他們看起來都很高興，也笑了。
But they all looked really happy, and laughed.

S.FORM: kelaan daha seediq nii ini sipaq seediq ini pnhuqin dheya.
S.TRANSL: 他們猜想這人不會殺人，所以也不會把青蛙弄死。
They guessed that this person wouldn't kill people, so he would not kill frogs either.

S.FORM: kiya mntena mheyu hiya ka daha qpatun mpitu wawa na ga mesa swaye ta.
S.TRANSL: 那兩隻青蛙和七隻小青蛙便站在那兒，說：「再見了！」。
So the two (parent) frogs, along with the seven kid frogs, stood there and said "goodbye, then."

S.FORM: so kiya ka mqaras p lngelungan na tama bubu qpatun.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙爸爸和青蛙媽媽感到很高興。
The father frog and mother frog felt happy.

S.FORM: so betaq hini kari so nodaan nii we.
S.TRANSL: 這個故事應該就到這裡。
So the story would probably end here.

S.FORM: wada mq so ini kseyang bubu tama bubu na uri.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙爸爸和青蛙媽媽也不會擔心。
The father frog and mother frog were not worried.

S.FORM: kiya mesa kelaan dngaun daha seediq gaga malu lngelungan na riso kiya.
S.TRANSL: 他們猜想這小男孩心腸很好。
They guessed that the boy was kind-hearted.

S.FORM: mqaras paru ka huling paru quwaq hulis na.
S.TRANSL: 狗很高興，張著嘴大笑。
The dog was very happy. He laughed, with his mouth widely open.

S.FORM: kari nii betaq hini so nodaan qpatun dahaka riso ma huling.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙、男孩和狗的故事就到這裡。
So the story about the frog, the boy, and the dog ends here.

S.FORM: betaq hini kari mu.
S.TRANSL: 我就講到這邊。
My story ends here.
